text.title: Solo Support SLA Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-channels
step.action: List every inbound channel + last 30-day response times.

step.name: define-3-tiers
step.action: Map plan IDs to community / paid / enterprise; pick response_time_h per tier.

step.name: publish-and-route
step.action: Run `validate-solo-support-sla-template.py`. Publish on /support page; configure helpdesk routing.
